name: journal-of-world-economy-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to 《世界经济》 (The Journal of World Economy) — the China Academy of Social Sciences flagship for international / open-economy economics, run by the Chinese Society of World Economy and the CASS Institute of World Economics and Politics (monthly; ISSN 1002-9621; CN 11-1138/F). Covers open-economy fit positioning, international causal questions, dialogue with international trade / finance classics, customs-micro / cross-country / GVC data, external-shock + shift-share / gravity identification, trade / investment / financial / expectation transmission channels, heterogeneity, tables and figures, opening-up policy implications, submission preflight (页下注 footnotes, www.jweonline.cn), and R&R rebuttals.
